items.markdown:
**POPIA** stands for the **Protection of Personal Information Act** . It is South Africa's primary data privacy and protection law, often referred to as the POPI Act. Its main purpose is to give effect to the constitutional right to privacy by regulating how public and private bodies handle personal data.[](https://safetica.com/resources/blogs/popi-act-the-scope-purpose-and-how-to-comply) [[1]](https://safetica.com/resources/blogs/popi-act-the-scope-purpose-and-how-to-comply)[[2]](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/)[[3]](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/)[[4]](https://popia.co.za/section-2-purpose-of-act/)

Key Details

- **What it does:** It sets strict minimum requirements for how organizations must collect, store, process, and share personal information.
- **Who it applies to:** Any business, organization, or individual in South Africa that processes personal data, as well as foreign entities that process South African data.
- **What counts as personal data:** Names, ID numbers, contact details, medical history, financial records, race, and biometric information.[](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/) [[1]](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/)[[2]](https://www.gov.za/documents/protection-personal-information-act)[[3]](https://www.proofpoint.com/uk/blog/information-protection/ultimate-guide-popia-south-africas-privacy-law)[[4]](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/)[[5]](https://bregmans.co.za/2025/03/17/protection-of-personal-information-act/)

8 Core Principles of POPIA To comply with POPIA, organizations must adhere to these fundamental conditions:[](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/) [[1]](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/)

1. **Accountability:** Organizations must take responsibility for complying with the law.
2. **Processing Limitation:** Data must be processed lawfully and minimally, without infringing on privacy.
3. **Purpose Specification:** Personal information must be collected for a specific, defined reason.
4. **Further Processing Limitation:** Data cannot be used for a new purpose that is incompatible with the original reason it was collected.
5. **Information Quality:** Organizations must ensure the data they hold is complete, accurate, and up to date.
6. **Openness:** Data subjects (the individuals whose data is collected) must be aware that their data is being collected and why.
7. **Security Safeguards:** Organizations must implement strict measures to protect data against loss, damage, or unauthorized access (e.g., data breaches).
8. **Data Subject Participation:** Individuals have the right to request access to their data, or request that it be corrected or deleted.[](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/) [[1]](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/)[[2]](https://cookiefirst.com/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act-popia-and-cookie-consent/)[[3]](https://safetica.com/resources/blogs/popi-act-the-scope-purpose-and-how-to-comply)[[4]](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/)[[5]](https://captaincompliance.com/education/the-protection-of-personal-information-act-popia-a-comprehensive-guide-to-south-africas-data-privacy-regulation/)

Why it matters The law gives individuals greater control over their personal information, such as the right to object to direct marketing. For organizations, strict compliance is mandatory. Failure to comply can result in severe consequences, including massive financial penalties or even imprisonment for severe violations.[](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/) [[1]](https://termly.io/resources/articles/south-africas-protection-of-personal-information-act/)[[2]](https://www.gov.za/documents/protection-personal-information-act)[[3]](https://werksmans.com/popia-a-guide-to-the-protection-of-personal-information-act-of-south-africa/)[[4]](https://inforegulator.org.za/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/English.pdf)[[5]](https://www.cookiehub.com/popia)For further details or to read the legislation in full, visit the [South African Government Document Portal](https://www.gov.za/documents/protection-personal-information-act) or consult the [Information Regulator](https://inforegulator.org.za/).
